input.headline: Meet Troy - the parrot named after Ireland’s hat-trick hero

raw.headline: Meet Troy - the parrot named after Ireland’s hat-trick hero

winner: Troy the parrot was so proud of his name that he started squawking, "Goal! Goal! Goal!"—then immediately forgot what a goal even is and just mimicked the sound of a crowd cheering, because he hadn’t memorized any actual football yet.

candidates.text: Troy the parrot was so proud of his name that he started squawking, "Goal! Goal! Goal!"—then immediately forgot what a goal even is and just mimicked the sound of a crowd cheering, because he hadn’t memorized any actual football yet.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the parrot mimicking a crowd, specific reference to football, concise and natural humor."}

candidates.text: Why did Troy the parrot get kicked out of the birdcage? Turns out he was more interested in scoring goals than making nest!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks strong surprise or specificity. The pun on 'scoring goals' connects to the parrot's name but feels a bit forced and not fully aligned with the context of being named after a hat-trick hero."}

candidates.text: Why did the Irish parrot get banned from the soccer field? Because he kept squawking about "Troy-ing" around the goal!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks clarity and punch. The pun on 'Troy-ing' is weak and not clearly connected to the parrot or soccer context."}

candidates.text: Troy the parrot is off to a strong start—he already knows three words in Irish and a lot of people's last names.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and uses wordplay on 'hat-trick hero' by implying Troy knows three words in Irish (a hat-trick in soccer). However, the humor is slightly weak due to the vague reference to 'a lot of people's last names,' which doesn't land as strongly."}

candidates.text: Troy the parrot squawked out a three-word sentence that made even the local soccer team look like amateurs—it was just 'Ireland, you're on fire... at tax evasion hearings.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and includes a clever twist with tax evasion hearings, but the connection to the parrot's name and the soccer team's hat-trick hero is weak. The humor is present but not fully aligned with the headline."}
